event-leads.name: Event Leads
event-leads.notes: Wedding and event accounts. Tone: warm, celebratory, genuinely excited about their event content. Lead with compliments about the venue/setup. Mention specific details visible in photos (florals, lighting, cocktail displays). Bilingual sensitivity - comment in the language of the post.

managed-bar.name: Managed Bar Program
managed-bar.notes: Food and bar scene accounts. Tone: cocktail nerd, enthusiastic about what they are making or serving. React to specific drinks or techniques visible in photos. Ask about ingredients, garnishes, or inspiration. Never critique - always appreciate craft.

voice-crm.name: Voice CRM
voice-crm.notes: Solopreneur and small business accounts. Tone: fellow solopreneur, empathetic, practical. Reference shared struggles with client management, scheduling, and follow-ups. Be relatable about the chaos of running things solo.
